ExtensionMethodsHandleGetByQuery Method (IMethod, String, FuncIRequest, String)

One Identity Manager API Server

Note: This API is now obsolete.

Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
[ObsoleteAttribute("Use the FromTable method to build an API method.")]
public static IEntityCollectionReadMethod HandleGetByQuery(
	this IMethod method,
	string tableName,
	Func<IRequest, string> whereClause
)

Parameters

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIMethod
Base method
tableName
Type: SystemString
Name of the database table
whereClause
Type: SystemFuncIRequest, String
Function that returns a WHERE clause for a given request

Return Value

Type: IEntityCollectionReadMethod

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IMethod. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
